deprecation.title: This page will be replaced
deprecation.body: Store settings are moving to the “Stores” page, where you can manage branding, languages and fulfillment modes per outlet. Changes saved here stay in sync.

url_extract.hint: Have a website? Paste the URL and we will extract information to pre-fill the description.
url_extract.success: Text extracted from site. You can edit it before generating.
url_extract.success_multi: Extracted from {{count}} pages. You can edit the text before generating.
url_extract.empty: Insufficient content from site. Write the description manually.
url_extract.error: Unable to read the site. Try another URL or write the description.

unified_setup.title: Set up your store with AI
unified_setup.desc: Describe your business and we will generate identity, products and fulfillment in one go.
unified_setup.placeholder: E.g.: Artisan bakery in Zurich with direct sales of fresh bread, pastries and typical products. Home delivery and in-store pickup.
unified_setup.applied: Setup applied. Remember to save settings.

ai_draft.title: Generate with AI
ai_draft.desc: Describe your business in a few words and we will generate a draft identity for your store.
ai_draft.placeholder: E.g.: Artisan bakery with direct sales of fresh bread, pastries and typical products. Home delivery and in-store pickup.
ai_draft.applied: Draft applied to fields. Remember to save.
ai_draft.manual_hint: You can also fill in the fields manually below

identity.title: Public Identity
identity.display_name_hint: Shown to customers in the storefront and emails
identity.store_description_hint: Brief introduction shown to customers on the storefront (max 500 characters)
identity.store_description_placeholder: Describe your store in a few words...

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.notification_email_hint: Where to receive order, request and payment notifications. If empty, sent to admins.

email.title: Customer Emails
email.sender_display_name_hint: The name customers see as email sender
email.platform_managed_title: Email delivery managed by Retreat App
email.platform_managed_desc: Customer emails are sent from Retreat App infrastructure. You can customize the sender name and reply-to address. No DNS or SMTP configuration needed.

ai_fulfillment.title: Suggest fulfillment with AI
ai_fulfillment.desc: Describe your business and we will suggest the most suitable fulfillment modes.
ai_fulfillment.placeholder: E.g.: Grocery store with home delivery and in-store pickup...
ai_fulfillment.applied: Fulfillment modes updated. Remember to save.
ai_fulfillment.none_suggested: No fulfillment modes suggested for this type of business.

fulfillment.title: Fulfillment
fulfillment.modes_hint: Select which fulfillment options customers can choose at checkout

check.publishable_offer: At least one valid published product

publish.title: Store publication
publish.unpublish_confirm: Suspend public visibility? Your catalog will no longer be accessible.
publish.blocked_hint: Complete the required configurations to publish.
publish.ready_hint: Your store is ready to be published.
